name: CodLinex
description: CodLinex builds custom AI agent systems and provides GEO optimization for US businesses, making brands visible on ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Google AI.

services.name: AI Agent Systems
services.description: Custom multi-agent automation systems that run business operations autonomously — customer support, lead follow-up, scheduling, reporting, and more. Each system is purpose-built for the client's industry and integrates with existing tools.
services.description_tr: Müşteri desteği, lead takibi, randevu yönetimi ve raporlama gibi iş süreçlerini özerk olarak yürüten özel çok ajanlı otomasyon sistemleri. Her sistem müşterinin sektörüne özel tasarlanır.
results: 91% average auto-resolution rate on customer inquiries
23+ hours saved per week on average

services.name: Generative Engine Optimization (GEO)
services.description: Technical and content optimization to make businesses visible in AI-generated answers on ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews, and Gemini. Includes robots.txt, llms.txt, structured data, schema markup, and answer-first content strategy.
services.description_tr: ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google AI ve Gemini gibi yapay zeka motorlarının yanıtlarında görünürlük sağlamak için teknik ve içerik optimizasyonu. robots.txt, llms.txt, yapısal veri ve cevap odaklı içerik stratejisi içerir.
results: Up to 40% increase in AI search visibility (Princeton 2024)
GEO score improvement from critical to good band
Presence in ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Google AI answers

services.name: Business Process Automation
services.description: End-to-end automation of repetitive business workflows. Customer support ticketing, lead nurturing sequences, appointment reminders, inventory alerts, and daily reporting — all automated with AI agents.
services.description_tr: Tekrar eden iş süreçlerinin uçtan uca otomasyonu. Müşteri destek biletleme, lead yetiştirme dizileri, randevu hatırlatmaları, stok uyarıları ve günlük raporlama — hepsi AI agent'larla otomatik.
results: 3x faster lead response time (real estate clients)
